title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 321.360 - Form of ballot
text:
321.360.  Form of ballot. — 1.  The question shall be submitted in substantially the following form:
  2.  The proposition so submitted, if relating to bonds, shall set out the amount of the issue and the purpose.
(L. 1947 V. I p. 432 § 36, A.L. 1969 H.B. 322, A.L. 1978 H.B. 971, S.B. 628)
